context: Tests whether the Core Motion skill guides CMMotionManager lifecycle, availability, privacy, and reference-frame choices for SwiftUI tilt controls.

checklist.name: Motion usage description
checklist.description: Calls out that the app should include NSMotionUsageDescription before accessing motion data.

checklist.name: Single motion manager
checklist.description: Uses or recommends one shared CMMotionManager instead of creating independent managers per SwiftUI view.

checklist.name: Availability checks
checklist.description: Checks isDeviceMotionAvailable or the relevant accelerometer/gyro availability before starting updates.

checklist.name: Battery-aware rate
checklist.description: Chooses a reasonable update interval for tilt controls and avoids assuming the highest possible sample rate is appropriate.

checklist.name: Lifecycle stop
checklist.description: Stops the matching Core Motion updates when the view or service is no longer active.

checklist.name: Reference frame check
checklist.description: Checks available attitude reference frames before requesting a specific north-based or corrected frame.
